prerequisites.value: Dex 15, Exotic Weapon Proficiency ( sawtooth sabre ), Two-Weapon Fighting, worshiper of a deity of blood, death, or assassination.

description.value: **Benefit:** If you hit an opponent with both your primary weapon and your off-hand weapon as part of the same attack action, and both of those weapons are sawtooth sabres, you deal 1 point of bleed damage in addition to the normal damage dealt by these attacks. Combat Trick Note If using the optional Stamina Pool rules, the following trick may be used with this feat. Combat Trick: You can spend 2 stamina points when dealing bleed damage with the Bloody Sabres feat to increase the amount of bleed damage your opponent takes by 1.
